footer.tagline: The infrastructure layer for global sports markets. Exchange-grade technology powering next-generation trading.

home.heroSubtitle: High-performance exchange technology, deep professional liquidity, and programmable APIs powering next-generation sports trading exchanges.
home.pillarsSubtitle: Purpose-built components designed for professional market participants and exchange operators worldwide.
home.pillarLiquidityDesc: Aggregated liquidity from professional market makers and institutional sources, delivering tight spreads and deep order books across all supported markets.
home.pillarTechDesc: Purpose-built matching engine with deterministic execution, low-latency order processing, and real-time risk controls designed for high-throughput environments.
home.pillarIntelDesc: Advanced customer segmentation, dynamic exposure management, and automated hedging infrastructure for sophisticated risk management.
home.pillarWhiteLabelDesc: Deploy a fully branded exchange in weeks with hosted UI, settlement engine, risk tools, and flexible commission structures.
home.clientsSubtitle: BTX serves institutions and professionals who require exchange-grade infrastructure, deep liquidity, and programmable market access.
home.clientMakersDesc: High-performance APIs, competitive fee tiers, and co-location ready infrastructure.
home.clientExchangesDesc: White-label solutions with full branding control, settlement, and risk management.
home.clientDataDesc: Deep sports data integration, real-time feeds, and predictive analytics capabilities.
home.clientTradersDesc: Professional-grade execution, advanced order types, and transparent market access.
home.archSubtitle: Our matching engine processes orders with deterministic execution at sub-5ms latency. Designed for professional throughput with crash recovery and zero order loss.
home.archFeature1: Low-latency order book with price-time priority
home.archFeature3: Real-time risk controls and exposure management
home.archFeature4: REST & WebSocket APIs with sandbox access
home.ctaSubtitle: Connect with our team to explore API access, liquidity partnerships, or white-label deployment.

about.heroTitle: Build the Engine That Powers Global
about.heroSubtitle: BTX is market infrastructure — not another betting exchange. We provide the technology, liquidity, and operational backbone that powers professional sports trading exchanges worldwide.
about.missionTitle: Powering the Future of Sports Trading
about.missionSubtitle: We exist to provide the critical infrastructure that enables professional participants to create, access, and trade sports markets with institutional-grade tools and deep liquidity.
about.visionDesc: To be the exchange that powers exchanges — providing the underlying technology and liquidity layer that enables operators worldwide to build and scale their trading platforms.
about.journeyTitle: From Trading Expertise to Market Infrastructure
about.timelineFoundationDesc: Built on over a decade of exchange trading experience, BTX was founded to bring institutional-grade infrastructure to the sports trading market.
about.timelineEvolutionDesc: Integration with comprehensive sports data sources — pricing models, real-time feeds, and predictive analytics powering accurate market creation.
about.timelineTodayDesc: A mature platform serving operators globally with reliable matching, settlement, and risk management — continuously refined through production use.
about.groupSubtitle: BTX operates across three integrated verticals, each contributing to a cohesive exchange infrastructure platform.
about.groupDataDesc: Deep sports data integration and analytics. Real-time feeds, historical databases, and predictive modelling capabilities.
about.groupTechDesc: Purpose-built exchange infrastructure. Matching engine, risk systems, API platform, and operational tooling.
about.groupEngineDesc: Core trading infrastructure. Liquidity bridge, settlement engine, risk controls, and market creation tools.
about.valueIntegrityDesc: We operate with transparency and accountability. Our systems are designed for fair, auditable markets.
about.valuePerformanceDesc: Sub-millisecond matters. We obsess over latency, throughput, and reliability in everything we build.
about.valueInnovationDesc: We continuously evolve our technology to stay ahead of market demands and operator requirements.
about.valueGlobalDesc: Built for multi-region deployment with localisation, compliance, and infrastructure flexibility.
about.ctaSubtitle: Explore how BTX infrastructure can power your exchange, trading operations, or market making activity.

technology.heroSubtitle: Our exchange engine delivers institutional-grade performance with deterministic matching, comprehensive risk controls, and programmable APIs designed for professional market participants.
technology.engineSubtitle: Purpose-built matching engine with price-time priority, supporting complex order types and synthetic liquidity generation.
technology.engineLatencyDesc: Deterministic price-time priority matching optimised for high-throughput environments.
technology.engineOrderBookDesc: Full depth-of-market visibility with synthetic liquidity via cross-runner matching algorithms.
technology.engineRecoveryDesc: Persistent order state ensures zero order loss across system restarts and failover events.
technology.engineThroughputDesc: Engineered to handle sustained order volumes with linear performance scaling.
technology.riskSubtitle: Dynamic exposure controls, customer profiling, and automated hedging infrastructure for sophisticated risk management.
technology.riskExposureDesc: Per-market and global exposure limits with real-time position monitoring and automated risk responses.
technology.riskIntelDesc: Behavioural profiling and segmentation for sophisticated counterparty risk management.
technology.riskSegmentationDesc: Smart order routing with adaptive spread management based on flow quality analysis.
technology.riskHedgingDesc: Real-time hedge execution via liquidity bridge with configurable strategy parameters.
technology.marketSubtitle: Fast in-play markets, extensive market type coverage, and custom market creation capabilities.
technology.marketInPlayDesc: Sub-second market updates for live event trading across all supported sports verticals.
technology.marketTypesDesc: Match odds, handicaps, over/under, correct score, and custom event markets.
technology.marketCustomDesc: Agent-requested and programmatic market creation for niche events and prediction markets.
technology.apiSubtitle: RESTful APIs, WebSocket streams, and sandbox environments designed for rapid integration and reliable operation.
technology.apiGrpcDesc: High-performance binary protocol for orders, markets, and account management
technology.apiWsDesc: Real-time streaming for prices, order updates, and market events
technology.apiSandboxDesc: Full-featured test environment with simulated market data
technology.apiIdempotencyDesc: Safe retry semantics for all mutating operations
technology.apiAtomicDesc: Cancel-and-place orders in a single atomic request
technology.apiRateLimitDesc: Transparent, tier-based rate limits with burst capacity
technology.ctaSubtitle: Get sandbox access and start building with our exchange APIs today.

liquidity.heroSubtitle: Deep order books, transparent fee structures, and performance-grade infrastructure designed for professional market makers and institutional liquidity providers.
liquidity.feeSubtitle: A clear maker/taker fee model with volume-based tiers and performance incentives.
liquidity.feeTransparentDesc: Clear maker/taker fee structure with no hidden costs. Competitive rates designed for professional volume.
liquidity.feeVolumeDesc: Progressive fee reduction as monthly volumes increase. Rewarding sustained market participation.
liquidity.feeIncentiveDesc: Performance-based fee rebates and network participation incentives for qualifying liquidity providers.
liquidity.tiersSubtitle: Progressive fee reduction rewards sustained trading activity.
liquidity.tierCustomNote: Custom pricing available for qualifying market makers. Contact us for details.
liquidity.infraSubtitle: Purpose-built for algorithmic trading, market making, and high-frequency strategies.
liquidity.infraCoLocationDesc: Low-latency connectivity options for firms requiring the fastest possible execution and market data delivery.
liquidity.infraLatencyDesc: Sub-5ms matching engine latency with consistent performance under high-volume conditions.
liquidity.infraOrderTypesDesc: Limit, market, cancel-and-replace, and atomic multi-leg operations designed for algorithmic strategies.
liquidity.incentiveSubtitle: Structured incentive programs for liquidity providers who meet performance benchmarks and contribute to market quality.
liquidity.incentiveRebatesDesc: Earn fee rebates based on quoting quality, uptime, and spread tightness metrics.
liquidity.incentiveVolumeDesc: Additional rewards for consistent monthly volume targets across priority markets.
liquidity.incentiveNetworkDesc: Strategic equity participation programs for qualifying infrastructure partners.
liquidity.partnerDesc: We're seeking professional market makers and institutional liquidity providers to join our network. Partners gain access to preferential fee structures, dedicated support, and co-location options.
liquidity.ctaSubtitle: Connect with our partnerships team to discuss fee structures, technical requirements, and onboarding.

whiteLabel.heroSubtitle: Deploy a fully branded, exchange-grade trading platform powered by BTX infrastructure. From matching engine to settlement — everything you need to operate a professional sports exchange.
whiteLabel.componentsSubtitle: A complete exchange stack — from front-end UI to back-end settlement — fully managed and continuously updated.
whiteLabel.compBrandedUIDesc: Deploy a complete trading interface with your brand identity — logo, colours, domain, and custom styling applied across all touchpoints.
whiteLabel.compRiskDesc: Dynamic exposure controls, customer profiling, and automated hedging infrastructure included out of the box.
whiteLabel.compSettlementDesc: Automated settlement with multi-currency support, real-time reconciliation, and comprehensive audit trails.
whiteLabel.compCommissionDesc: Flexible revenue-sharing structures with configurable commission models, tiered partner programs, and transparent reporting.
whiteLabel.deploySubtitle: Our structured deployment process ensures a smooth, predictable launch timeline.
whiteLabel.step1Desc: Define scope, markets, branding, and commercial structure.
whiteLabel.step2Desc: Platform setup, branding, risk parameters, and API integration.
whiteLabel.step3Desc: Sandbox environment for UAT, stress testing, and compliance review.
whiteLabel.step4Desc: Go live with full support, monitoring, and ongoing optimisation.
whiteLabel.integrationSubtitle: Deep integration capabilities to connect BTX with your existing infrastructure.
whiteLabel.intApiDesc: Full REST & WebSocket API access for deep integration with your existing systems and workflows.
whiteLabel.intDashboardDesc: Comprehensive back-office tools for user management, market configuration, and operational oversight.
whiteLabel.intReportingDesc: Live dashboards with trading volumes, P&L analytics, customer activity, and risk exposure metrics.
whiteLabel.partnersSubtitle: Whether you're a regional operator, sports community, or Web3 platform — BTX white-label gives you the infrastructure to compete.
whiteLabel.partnerRegionalDesc: Launch a localised exchange for your market with region-specific sports, languages, and payment methods.
whiteLabel.partnerAffiliatesDesc: Convert your audience into active traders with a fully managed exchange platform under your brand.
whiteLabel.partnerSportsDesc: Engage sports fans with professional-grade prediction markets tailored to your community interests.
whiteLabel.partnerCryptoDesc: Add sports trading to your crypto offering with seamless stablecoin integration and hybrid settlement.
whiteLabel.whySubtitle: BTX white-label is not a template — it's a live exchange infrastructure backed by institutional-grade technology.
whiteLabel.whyItem1: No development team required — fully managed platform
whiteLabel.whyItem2: Continuous updates to matching engine and risk systems
whiteLabel.whyItem3: Access to BTX liquidity pool and market maker network
whiteLabel.whyItem4: Flexible commercial terms with transparent revenue sharing
whiteLabel.whyItem5: Dedicated account management and technical support
whiteLabel.whyItem6: Full regulatory and compliance framework support
whiteLabel.deployItem2: Full order book & matching engine access
whiteLabel.ctaSubtitle: Get in touch with our partnerships team to discuss your white-label requirements.

markets.heroSubtitle: BTX provides institutional-depth markets across cricket, football, tennis, and custom verticals — with real-time in-play trading and automated pricing.
markets.sportsSubtitle: Deep market coverage across the world's most traded sports with full in-play support.
markets.capSubtitle: Advanced capabilities that power every market on the BTX platform.
markets.capInPlayDesc: Sub-second market updates with automated suspension and price adjustment during live events.
markets.capTypesDesc: From simple match winner to complex session-based markets, supporting diverse trading strategies.
markets.capFastDesc: Rapid deployment of new markets with automated pricing and settlement rules.
markets.capCustomDesc: Agent-requested and bespoke markets for prediction events, political outcomes, and niche verticals.
markets.capPricingDesc: Algorithmically generated prices with real-time adjustment based on market activity and data feeds.
markets.capMultiOpDesc: Same underlying market infrastructure serves multiple white-label operators with isolated risk.
markets.customSubtitle: BTX supports market creation beyond traditional sports — enabling operators to serve niche audiences with bespoke trading opportunities.
markets.customDesc: Our flexible market creation engine allows operators and agents to request custom markets for any verifiable outcome. Markets are subject to jurisdictional compliance and settlement verification requirements.
markets.customPredictionDesc: Event-driven markets for outcomes beyond traditional sports.
markets.customAgentDesc: Custom markets created on demand for specific operator needs.
markets.customPoliticalDesc: Election and political outcome markets (jurisdiction dependent).
markets.customEntertainmentDesc: Awards, reality TV, and cultural event markets.
markets.customEsportsDesc: Competitive gaming markets across major titles and tournaments.
markets.customNicheDesc: Kabaddi, table tennis, darts, and emerging sports coverage.
markets.ctaSubtitle: Contact our team to discuss market coverage, custom verticals, or operator access.

developers.heroSubtitle: Powerful, well-documented APIs for market data, order management, and settlement. Everything you need to integrate with BTX exchange infrastructure.
developers.apiSubtitle: RESTful APIs, real-time WebSocket streams, and comprehensive SDKs for seamless integration.
developers.apiRestDesc: Full-featured RESTful API for account management, order placement, market data, and settlement operations.
developers.apiWsDesc: Real-time data streams for prices, order updates, market events, and account notifications with minimal latency.
developers.apiSandboxDesc: Full-featured test environment with simulated markets, paper trading, and risk-free integration testing.
developers.apiSdksDesc: Official client libraries for Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, and C# to accelerate your integration.
developers.quickSubtitle: Simple, powerful APIs designed for rapid integration.
developers.specSubtitle: Designed for professional integrators with institutional-grade requirements.
developers.resApiDocsDesc: Comprehensive reference for all endpoints, request/response schemas, and authentication flows.
developers.resCodeSamplesDesc: Working examples in multiple languages covering common integration patterns and workflows.
developers.resRateLimitsDesc: Detailed rate limit documentation per endpoint with guidance for high-frequency integrations.
developers.resStatusDesc: Real-time platform status, incident history, and uptime metrics for all BTX services.
developers.ctaSubtitle: Request API credentials and sandbox access to begin integrating with BTX infrastructure.

compliance.heroSubtitle: BTX operates with the regulatory rigour expected of institutional-grade market infrastructure. Our compliance framework is designed to give operators, traders, and regulators confidence in our platform.
compliance.frameworkSubtitle: Our compliance architecture covers the full spectrum of regulatory requirements for exchange infrastructure.
compliance.pillarJurisdictionDesc: BTX operates within a carefully structured regulatory framework designed for multi-jurisdictional deployment. Our architecture supports localised compliance requirements while maintaining global operational standards.
compliance.pillarKycDesc: Comprehensive identity verification and anti-money laundering protocols integrated at every layer. Tiered KYC processes calibrated to risk levels and regulatory requirements.
compliance.pillarSurveillanceDesc: Real-time surveillance systems monitor trading patterns, detect manipulation, and enforce market integrity. Automated alerts and investigation workflows for compliance teams.
compliance.pillarResponsibleDesc: Responsible trading controls including exposure limits, cooling-off mechanisms, and self-exclusion tools. Designed to meet operator obligations across regulated markets.
compliance.capSubtitle: Integrated tools and systems that ensure regulatory adherence across all operations.
compliance.capMonitoringDesc: Continuous monitoring of all transactions with automated screening against sanctions lists and PEP databases.
compliance.capSarDesc: Integrated SAR workflows with escalation protocols and regulatory filing support for compliance officers.
compliance.capMultiJurisDesc: Configurable compliance rules per jurisdiction. Geo-fencing, product restrictions, and localised regulatory reporting.
compliance.capDataProtectionDesc: GDPR-compliant data handling with encryption at rest and in transit. Data residency controls for regional requirements.
compliance.capAuditDesc: Complete, immutable audit logs for all platform activity. Regulatory-ready reporting and on-demand data extraction.
compliance.capIdentityDesc: Multi-tier KYC with document verification, biometric checks, and ongoing due diligence for high-risk accounts.
compliance.commitSubtitle: BTX is committed to operating at the highest standards of regulatory compliance and market integrity.
compliance.commitDesc: We believe that strong compliance is not just a requirement — it's a competitive advantage. Institutions and operators partner with BTX because they trust our governance, security, and regulatory posture.
compliance.commit1: Licensed or licensable framework across target jurisdictions
compliance.commit2: Independent security audits and penetration testing
compliance.commit3: Regular compliance programme reviews and updates
compliance.commit4: Dedicated compliance officer and regulatory liaison
compliance.commit5: Staff training on AML, responsible trading, and data protection
compliance.commit6: Transparent reporting to regulators and operators
compliance.commit7: Cooperation with law enforcement and integrity bodies
compliance.commit8: Continuous improvement based on regulatory developments
compliance.ctaSubtitle: For regulatory questions, compliance documentation, or partnership discussions.

contact.heroSubtitle: Whether you're exploring API integration, partnership opportunities, or white-label deployment — our team is ready to help.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for your enquiry. Our team will respond within one business day.
contact.fieldMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your requirements, use case, or questions...
contact.channelPartnershipDesc: Discuss white-label deployment, operator partnerships, and commercial arrangements.
contact.channelLiquidityDesc: Apply as a liquidity partner, discuss fee structures, and market making programmes.
contact.channelTechnicalDesc: Request API credentials, sandbox access, and technical integration support.
contact.channelGeneralDesc: For press, compliance, regulatory questions, or other general enquiries.
